text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization" is real and exists at arXiv:1412.6980, authored by **Diederik P. Kingma** and **Jimmy Ba**. However, the cited reference lists the authors as "P. K. Diederik" and "B. Lei," which do not match the real authors in any version of the paper — these are completely fabricated author names, making this a classic "grafted" hallucination (real title, fake authors).
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1412.6980
